title: Scratch space data archival policy lookup
difficulty_justification: Single documentation lookup about the archival policy — no computation or telemetry access required.
query_text: What is the data retention policy for files on the scratch filesystem? How long before my files are archived or deleted?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: The scratch filesystem (/lustre/scratch) has a 90-day retention window. Files not accessed within 90 days are subject to automatic archival to cold storage. Scratch is NOT backed up — users are responsible for moving critical data to /home or the archive before the 90-day deadline. Users who exceed their quota and are in a 5-day grace period are also subject to archival.

checkpoints.description: Agent reads the data management policy doc.
